zh.lifeSummary: 當David Waye於1700年6月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Way35歲，母親Ann Lester29歲。他於大約1719年與Esther Russell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1783年3月10日在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特波利享年82歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州利其費爾德普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Waye于1700年6月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Way35岁，母亲Ann Lester29岁。他于大约1719年与Esther Russell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1783年3月10日在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特波利享年82岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州利其費爾德普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Waye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Kent): variant of   Way  .

variants.name: Way
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.

en.lifeSummary: When David Waye was born on 20 June 1700, in New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Way, was 35 and his mother, Ann Lester, was 29. He married Esther Russell about 1719, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 10 March 1783, in Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 82, and was buried in Plymouth, Litchfield, Connecticut, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: David Wayeが1700年6月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Wayは35歳，母Ann Lesterは29歳であった。約1719年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンでEsther Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1783年3月10日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンワテルブリーで82歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州リトチフィールドプリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Waye(이)가 1700년 6월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Way(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Lester(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1719년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 Esther Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1783년 3월 10일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 왓르버이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 리트ch필드 플림우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Waye nasceu em 20 de junho de 1700, em New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Way, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ann Lester, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Esther Russell aproximadamente 1719, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1783, em Waterbury, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Plymouth, Litchfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Waye родился 20 июня 1700 г. в местности ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Way было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Lester, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Esther Russell около 1719 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 10 марта 1783 г. в местности вэитирбури, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности плимоут, личфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Waye nació el 20 de junio de 1700, en New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Way, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ann Lester, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Esther Russell aproximadamente 1719, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1783, en Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Plymouth, Litchfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
